claim_bullets.bullet_text: Understanding const requires understanding lexical scoping. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.55-57)
Const behaves similarly to parameter invocations in lexical scoping. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.55-57)

source_record_text: Chapter on const and lexical scope from JavaScript Allongé, covering the semantics of binding names with const and how it relates to closures and lexical scoping.
